detail.description:
▣ 1st Anniversary Event: GRAND FESTA OF VALHALLA ▣
 A festival to celebrate a year of greatness! 
 Don't miss out on the greatest reward the gods can offer.
 The most epic event ever! 
 
 ▣ New Class: The Bard Released ▣
 It's time to dominate the battlefield with music!
 The Bard, a new sub class of the Priest, has joined the battle. 
 Play your harp to aid your allies and disrupt your foes!

▣Game Introduction▣
■ An MMORPG That Challenges the Gods' Realms
Godlike visuals powered by Unreal Engi
